summary: Updated conductor.py to use instance-scoped paths via instance_paths.py. Removed all flat path constants (STATE_PATH, ACTIVITY_LOG, RESULTS_DIR, LOGS_DIR, PENDING_GATE_PATH, GATE_RESPONSE_PATH, GODOT_MCP_LOCK_PATH, PROMPTS_DIR, SCHEMAS_DIR) from module scope. Retained REPO_ROOT and ORCH_DIR as module-level constants. Added --instance CLI flag defaulting to milestone arg. Updated main() to call resolve_instance() and load_config(). Updated Conductor.__init__ to accept paths: InstancePaths and config: dict. Updated all free functions and internal references to use explicit path parameters. All existing behavior preserved — no logic changes.
